kpis.title: Requests Running
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("vllm_num_requests_running" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Completed Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_request_success_total/stop", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Abort Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_request_success_total/abort", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Truncated Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_request_success_total/length", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Evicted Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_num_preemptions_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Prompt Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_prompt_tokens_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Generation Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_generation_tokens_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Requests Waiting
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("vllm_num_requests_waiting" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: KV Cache Usage
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("vllm_kv_cache_usage_perc" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Cached Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_prompt_tokens_cached_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Estimated FLOPS per GPU
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_estimated_flops_per_gpu_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Estimated Memory Read Bandwidth per GPU
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_estimated_read_bytes_per_gpu_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Estimated Memory Write Bandwidth per GPU
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_estimated_write_bytes_per_gpu_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: NIXL Failed Transfer Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_nixl_num_failed_transfers_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: NIXL Failed Notification Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_nixl_num_failed_notifications_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: NIXL Expired KV Request Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("vllm_nixl_num_kv_expired_reqs_total", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t
